phrases.french: Je voudrais visiter le jardin, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.english: I would like to visit the garden, please.
phrases.phonetic: zhuh voo-DRAY vee-zee-TAY luh zhar-DAN, seel voo PLAY
phrases.context: Created by Lawrence Johnston (who also made Hidcote in England), Serre de la Madone is one of the finest gardens on the Riviera. Booking ahead is recommended.

phrases.french: Est-ce qu'il y a une visite guidée ?
phrases.context: Guided tours are available and highly recommended — the garden's history and plant collection are fascinating.

phrases.french: Quelles plantes sont en fleur en ce moment ?
phrases.english: Which plants are in bloom right now?
phrases.phonetic: kel PLONT son on FLUR on suh moh-MON
phrases.context: The garden has year-round interest but spring (March–May) is spectacular for wisteria, roses, and rare perennials.

tips: Book in advance — entry is limited and often sells out in spring
Closed in summer (usually July–August) and Mondays/Tuesdays — check current schedule
Lawrence Johnston, the creator, also designed Hidcote Manor Garden in the English Cotswolds
